intro: Squirrels invading your Belleville home or business? From the Dutch Reformed Church area to neighborhoods near Belleville High School, our team knows the local building styles and common squirrel entry vulnerabilities throughout town.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Belleville, NJ?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Belleville typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. This includes humane trapping, entry point sealing, and prevention measures to ensure squirrels don't return.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Belleville attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying noises in your attic during early morning or evening hours, visible damage to soffits or roof vents, droppings in the attic, chewed electrical wiring, and insulation damage. You may also notice squirrels entering or exiting your roofline from the outside.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Belleville humane and legal?
faqs.answer: Yes, our squirrel removal methods are both humane and compliant with New Jersey wildlife regulations. We use live traps to safely capture squirrels and relocate them according to state guidelines, then seal entry points to prevent re-entry while ensuring no animals are trapped inside.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Belleville property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in Belleville and can typically begin trapping within 24 hours of your call. Most squirrel removal projects are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the number of squirrels present. Our exclusion work ensures permanent protection for your home.
